entries.summary: Bootstrap: Initial canonization of gavel-ai (large-repo strategy)

Complete oneshot workflow convergence: fixed processor bugs (deep copy, retry backoff, exception handling), implemented judge/list/milestone CLI commands, added integration tests (927 pass), implemented C-3-5 conversation timeout/error handling with retry logic and error classification

Added typed step-result attrs (processor_results, evaluation_results, test_subject, model_variant) to LocalRunContext; extracted compute_config_hash to storage/utils.py; migrated 5 hash tests to test_utils.py
Added typed step-result attrs to LocalRunContext and extracted compute_config_hash to storage/utils.py. Foundation for multi-variant DRY refactor.

Completed DRY refactor: multi-variant loop in ScenarioProcessorStep, variant-grouped JudgeRunnerStep, inline join in ReportRunnerStep, simplified judge CLI. Deleted ReJudge, ResultsExporter. 905 tests pass at 83% coverage.

Completed judge-dry-fix: DRY refactored oneshot pipeline on OutputRecord, multi-variant loop, variant-grouped judging, inline join in report, simplified judge CLI. Deleted ReJudge + ResultsExporter. 905 tests, 83% coverage.

Completed: Added gavel-ai-level rate-limit retry for DeepEval judge evaluations. Generalized retry_with_backoff() for reuse across processors, judges, and future layers. 910 tests pass at 83% coverage.
